name: Dole plc
summary: PART I Business Overview Dole plc is a global leader in the production, sourcing, distribution, and marketing of fresh fruits and vegetables. Our portfolio encompasses more than 300 products, which we grow and source both locally and worldwide from over 100 countries. As of December 31, 2025, we operate in 30 countries and distribute our products in more than 85 countries through retail, wholesale, foodservice and e-commerce channels.
